context: Evaluates correct use of the is_pinned field on notes and the note_update command to persist pin state. Tests that the solution modifies the is_pinned boolean on a retrieved Note object and calls note_update, and verifies the resulting sort order from notes_list.

checklist.name: is_pinned field modification
checklist.description: The solution sets `note.is_pinned = true` (or false) on a retrieved `Note` object before saving, rather than constructing a new object or only changing the title.

checklist.name: note_update to persist pin state
checklist.description: After modifying `is_pinned`, the solution calls `note_update` with the full note object to persist the change.

checklist.name: Pinned notes appear first in list
checklist.description: The solution calls `notes_list` after pinning and verifies (or demonstrates) that pinned notes have lower indices than unpinned notes in the returned array.

checklist.name: Unpin restores order
checklist.description: After unpinning, the solution calls `note_update` with `is_pinned: false` and notes return to chronological sort order.
